verdict: Recall-safe robust (0 vulns lost both sets/verifiers). LLM ~2x rule-based lift consistently. Absolute lift shrinks on harder/realistic data (LLM 48->25pp). Defensible figure ~+25pp precision (1.6x) at zero recall cost; +48pp was the easy-set optimistic case.
next_lever: Add the leaked semantic mitigations to the benign RAG corpus and/or stronger verifier model; re-run v2.
caveats: Curated contracts (realistic but not wild scanner output).
